title: pyrolirion arvense
intro: Pyrolirion arvense, commonly known as Field Horsetail, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Equisetaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including the treatment of urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and urinary incontinence, due to its diuretic properties. The therapeutic actions of Pyrolirion arvense include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential in wound healing and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Pyrolirion arvense include silicon, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
